title: Operating Systems
description: Explore OS fundamentals, process management, memory management, storage, and file systems through topic-based video lessons and AI support.
objectives: Understand the basics and functions of operating systems.
Understand memory management schemes and virtual memory.
Become familiar with I/O management and file systems.
Understand the basics of virtual machines and mobile operating systems.

topics.title: What is operating system

topics.title: COMPUTER SYSTEM
topics.subject: Operating Systems
topics.description:
A computer system is a combination of hardware and software components that work together to perform tasks efficiently. It consists of three main parts: hardware, system software (including the operating system), and application programs.

The hardware includes physical devices like the CPU, memory, storage, and input/output devices. The operating system acts as an interface between the user and the hardware, managing resources such as memory, processes, and devices. Application programs use these resources to perform specific tasks for users.

Overall, a computer system enables users to execute programs, store data, and interact with technology in a structured and efficient manner.
